responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Complete all IVX modules end-to-end: fix Maximum Update Depth crash, move internal metrics to admin, rebuild Reels with Instagram-style progressive loading, add staged video upload pipeline, per-module error boundaries, and ship APK build 22

## Constraints & Preferences
- ONLY the existing Expo React Native app is approved — no separate Kotlin app, no second Expo project
- Approved Android package: `com.ivxholdings.app`
- Use `bun x` / `bunx` not `npx`
- Never ask user for credentials — find them in project or work around blocker
- No secret values in logs, screenshots, reports
- Owner email: `iperez4242@gmail.com`
- API base: `https://api.ivxholding.com`
- EXPO_TOKEN and EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID NOT set — EAS cloud build blocked, must build locally
- Do NOT create new providers or architecture — modify EXISTING codebase only
- Never remove anything from the project
- Production APK must NOT depend on Metro, localhost, 127.0.0.1, 10.0.2.2, ngrok, or tunnel URLs
- All modules must display real live data, not placeholders, mocks, stale hardcoded totals or demo content
- Implement Instagram-style production patterns using standard RN/Expo/Supabase/pagination/caching/virtualization
- Per-module error boundaries — failed module must not crash entire app
- 50-test QA matrix on real Android device required for definition of done
- GitHub SHA, Android build SHA, and deployed production SHA must match

## Progress
### Done
- **Build 21 fixes (still present in code)**:
  - `expo/app/index.tsx` — initial route redirect to /login or /(tabs)
  - `expo/metro.config.js` — try/catch resilience for @rork-ai/toolkit-sdk/metro
  - `expo/lib/auth-context.tsx` — removed hardcoded password from loginOwnerPasswordless
  - `expo/lib/startup-trace.ts` — all 21 required checkpoints
  - Build 21 APK was built and uploaded (SHA-256: `352f7a8ab2ddb53262979da4c1e80647098e7c65270fdbe32a4fd1b7757ab618`, download: `https://litter.catbox.moe/tf2hx3.apk`)
- **Build 22 Phase 1 — Maximum Update Depth fix**:
  - Root cause: `expo/lib/email-context.tsx` queryFn called `setInboxStatus()`, `setBackendError()`, `setLastFetchSource()` INSIDE the queryFn — setState during query execution triggers re-renders → re-triggers query → infinite loop
  - Second cause: `expo/hooks/useReelsFeed.ts` line 59: `queueMicrotask(() => setAllVideos(data))` during render cycle
  - Third cause: `expo/app/videos.tsx` — `engagement` object changed identity every render, causing `useEffect([allVideos, engagement])` to re-run repeatedly
  - Fix: removed all setState from email-context queryFn, return status in query data instead; merged two duplicate useEffects (initial load + refresh merge) into single guarded effect with prev comparison; replaced queueMicrotask with guarded `useEffect([queryData, feedQuery.isLoading, allVideos.length])`; destructured `initEngagements` and `handleView` from engagement to stable callbacks
  - `expo/components/DiagnosticErrorBoundary.tsx` — rewritten with error categories (RENDER_ERROR, AUTH_ERROR, NETWORK_ERROR, DATA_ERROR, CONFIG_ERROR, UNKNOWN_ERROR), trace IDs, `classifyError()`, `generateTraceId()`, sanitized user-facing messages with stack traces below the fold
  - `expo/app/_layout.tsx` — `ProviderBoundary` no longer shows "Email unavailable"; now shows "IVX encountered a rendering error" with category + trace ID + Retry
- **Build 22 Phase 2 — Move internal metrics to Admin**:
  - Created `expo/app/admin/business-overview.tsx` — protected admin screen with: total/verified members, total/active investors, live/draft/funded deals, capital raised, annualized return, pending registrations, pending KYC, failed uploads, system/API health, storage usage
  - Modified `expo/app/(tabs)/(home)/home.tsx` — removed Members/Investors/Live Deals/Annual Returns cards (was `PortfolioSnapshot` using `fetchIvxHomeStats`), replaced with `UserActivitySnapshot` showing user-relevant content (Open Opportunities, Available Deals, Portfolio CTA, AI Advisor CTA)
  - Removed `fetchIvxHomeStats` import and `homeStatsQuery` from home screen
  - Added business-overview to `expo/app/admin/index.tsx` module list and `expo/app/admin/_layout.tsx` Stack.Screen
  - Renamed `expo/app/(tabs)/index.tsx` → `expo/app/(tabs)/crm.tsx` to fix duplicate index file structure error; updated tab name in `expo/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx`
- **Build 22 Phase 3-4 — Reels audit and progressive loading**:
  - `expo/app/videos.tsx` — changed from `fetchVideoFeed(24)` (all at once) to progressive: initial page of 10, `loadMore` callback with deduplication via `loadedIds` ref, `onEndReached` + `onEndReachedThreshold={0.5}` on FlatList, `windowSize` increased to 5
  - Engagement effect dependencies fixed — destructured `initEngagements` and `handleView` to avoid dependency on `engagement` object identity
- **Build 22 Phase 5 — Video upload pipeline**:
  - Created `expo/lib/video-upload-pipeline.ts` — staged upload: `selectVideoFromGallery()` (validates format/duration/size/permissions), `uploadVideoPipeline()` (presigned URL → XHR upload with progress → DB record creation), `pollVideoStatus()`, stages: selected→uploading→uploaded→processing→ready→failed, idempotency key, 500MB max, 10min max duration
- **Build 22 Phase 6 — Members progressive loading**:
  - `expo/app/admin/members.tsx` — added `displayCount` state (initial 20), `PAGE_SIZE=20`, `onEndReached` pagination on FlatList using `members.slice(0, displayCount)`, `useEffect` to reset displayCount on search change, added `useEffect` import
- **Build 22 Phase 13 — Per-module error recovery**:
  - Created `expo/components/ModuleErrorBoundary.tsx` — per-module crash isolation with error categories, trace IDs, retry button, `ModuleLoading` and `ModuleEmptyState` helper components
  - Wrapped reels FlatList in `ModuleErrorBoundary` in `app/videos.tsx`
- **Build 22 version bump**:
  - `expo/app.config.ts` — versionCode 22, buildMarker `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_15_BUILD_22_MODULE_COMPLETION_REELS_RECOVERY`
- **Static checks pass**: TypeScript 0 errors, Lint 0 errors, only pre-existing `backend/hono.ts` structure error
- Watchman neutralized; node_modules reinstalled; `rork.json` updated

### In Progress
- **Build 22 APK assembly** — Gradle `assembleRelease` repeatedly timing out at 60s sandbox limit
  - `expo-location` v15.1.1 has Java compilation errors with Expo SDK 54 (cannot find symbol) — not used anywhere in app but autolinked during fresh `expo prebuild`
  - Fixed: `classifier = 'sources'` → `archiveClassifier = 'sources'` in `expo-location/android/build.gradle`
  - Fixed: removed `expo-location/android/` dir, created stub `build.gradle` and `LocationModule.java`
  - Fixed: limited `reactNativeArchitectures=arm64-v8a` only in `android/gradle.properties`
  - Build has not yet completed — keeps timing out at 60s (previous build 21 took 63s)
- **Remaining phases not yet started**: Phase 7 (projects/deals progressive loading), Phase 8-9 (data fetching architecture + realtime), Phase 10-11 (image/media optimization + navigation performance), Phase 12 (admin content management), Phase 14-15 (QA matrix + deployment with proof)

### Blocked
- Gradle build times out at 60s sandbox limit — needs arm64-only + cached tasks to complete in time
- EXPO_TOKEN not set — EAS cloud build unavailable
- GitHub token expired (HTTP 401) — cannot push to GitHub repo, Render backend stuck at `0b37191f`
- Real-device testing cannot be done in sandbox — user must test installed APK
- Many screens still import from `expo/mocks/` (smart-investing, title-review, trust-center, vip-tiers, viral-growth, copy-investing, email-compose, admin/marketing, admin/outreach-analytics, admin/social-command, admin/system-monitor, etc.) — need removal per Phase 9

## Key Decisions
- Email context queryFn must NEVER call setState — return status in query data, sync via single guarded useEffect
- Engagement object destructured to stable callbacks to prevent effect dependency loops
- Internal business metrics moved to protected admin route, normal Home shows user-relevant content only
- Reels uses progressive loading (page of 10, onEndReached) instead of fetching all 24 at once
- Per-module error boundaries wrap individual sections so one crash doesn't crash the whole app
- arm64-v8a only architecture to cut native compilation time by 75%
- `expo-location` stubbed out since it's incompatible with SDK 54 and unused

## Next Steps
- Get Gradle build to complete within 60s timeout (kill stale daemons, retry with cached arm64-only tasks)
- If build keeps failing, try `expo prebuild --clean` then build again
- Complete Phase 7: progressive loading for projects, deals, properties, investors, transactions, messages, notifications
- Complete Phase 8-9: audit all modules for hardcoded/mock data, implement realtime delta updates
- Complete Phase 10-11: image thumbnails, lazy loading, cache-control
- Complete Phase 12: admin CRUD for all content types
- Run full 50-test QA matrix on real device
- Upload APK with direct download link, provide SHA-256, commit SHA, deployment proof

## Critical Context
- The "Maximum update depth exceeded" error was caught by `ProviderBoundary` in `app/_layout.tsx` which mislabeled it as "Email unavailable" — the real crash was in `email-context.tsx` queryFn calling setState
- `expo-location` v15.1.1 is incompatible with Expo SDK 54 — Java `cannot find symbol` errors in `LocationModule.java` and `LocationPackage.java`
- Previous build 21 took 63s for `assembleRelease` — just over the 60s sandbox timeout
- `reactNativeArchitectures` was reduced from `armeabi-v7a,arm64-v8a,x86,x86_64` to `arm64-v8
